## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Strapi and GrowthX teams to discuss content strategy, performance, and integration pages.](https://fathom.video/share/gzkSx4WKZyY4bMjvksKzj5JDYmJzt_sW?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Strong overall growth in content performance (115% week-over-week increase in clicks, 90,000+ impressions)](https://fathom.video/share/gzkSx4WKZyY4bMjvksKzj5JDYmJzt_sW?tab=summary&timestamp=120.0)
  - [New content enrichment process implemented to improve article quality and performance](https://fathom.video/share/gzkSx4WKZyY4bMjvksKzj5JDYmJzt_sW?tab=summary&timestamp=187.0)
  - [Focus on non-branded keywords for future content to drive organic acquisition](https://fathom.video/share/gzkSx4WKZyY4bMjvksKzj5JDYmJzt_sW?tab=summary&timestamp=1047.0)
  - [Integration pages need improvements in code formatting, related content, and overall quality](https://fathom.video/share/gzkSx4WKZyY4bMjvksKzj5JDYmJzt_sW?tab=summary&timestamp=1525.0)

## Topics

### Content Performance Update

  - [63 published articles, 5 more in drafts](https://fathom.video/share/gzkSx4WKZyY4bMjvksKzj5JDYmJzt_sW?tab=summary&timestamp=150.0)
  - [Cumulative and discrete growth in clicks and impressions](https://fathom.video/share/gzkSx4WKZyY4bMjvksKzj5JDYmJzt_sW?tab=summary&timestamp=124.0)
  - [E-commerce content performing exceptionally well, occupying top positions](https://fathom.video/share/gzkSx4WKZyY4bMjvksKzj5JDYmJzt_sW?tab=summary&timestamp=229.0)

### Integration Pages Progress

  - [Recently published several new integration pages](https://fathom.video/share/gzkSx4WKZyY4bMjvksKzj5JDYmJzt_sW?tab=summary&timestamp=246.0)
  - [78 total clicks and impressions so far (early data)](https://fathom.video/share/gzkSx4WKZyY4bMjvksKzj5JDYmJzt_sW?tab=summary&timestamp=290.0)
  - [Logos added to integration pages as planned](https://fathom.video/share/gzkSx4WKZyY4bMjvksKzj5JDYmJzt_sW?tab=summary&timestamp=308.0)
  - [Some pages missing descriptions (e.g., Quick, others to be addressed)](https://fathom.video/share/gzkSx4WKZyY4bMjvksKzj5JDYmJzt_sW?tab=summary&timestamp=373.0)

### Content Enrichment and CTAs

  - [Implementing new process: revamping intros, adding Strapi's perspective, more relevant links, new sections](https://fathom.video/share/gzkSx4WKZyY4bMjvksKzj5JDYmJzt_sW?tab=summary&timestamp=400.0)
  - [Custom graphics and screenshots being created](https://fathom.video/share/gzkSx4WKZyY4bMjvksKzj5JDYmJzt_sW?tab=summary&timestamp=422.0)
  - [In-content CTAs pending final design approval (Victor to review copy)](https://fathom.video/share/gzkSx4WKZyY4bMjvksKzj5JDYmJzt_sW?tab=summary&timestamp=478.0)
  - [Golzar to provide guidelines on CTA placement and implementation](https://fathom.video/share/gzkSx4WKZyY4bMjvksKzj5JDYmJzt_sW?tab=summary&timestamp=583.0)

### Content Refresh Results

  - [October 17 batch: 38% increase in clicks](https://fathom.video/share/gzkSx4WKZyY4bMjvksKzj5JDYmJzt_sW?tab=summary&timestamp=930.0)
  - [November 15 batch: 104% increase in clicks](https://fathom.video/share/gzkSx4WKZyY4bMjvksKzj5JDYmJzt_sW?tab=summary&timestamp=940.0)
  - [One article saw a 10% decrease, to be redone with updated process](https://fathom.video/share/gzkSx4WKZyY4bMjvksKzj5JDYmJzt_sW?tab=summary&timestamp=947.0)

### ChatGPT and Strapi Visibility

  - [No direct way to ensure Strapi links appear in ChatGPT responses](https://fathom.video/share/gzkSx4WKZyY4bMjvksKzj5JDYmJzt_sW?tab=summary&timestamp=1047.0)
  - [Focus on creating high-quality, authoritative content with clear intent](https://fathom.video/share/gzkSx4WKZyY4bMjvksKzj5JDYmJzt_sW?tab=summary&timestamp=1178.0)
  - [Improve E-A-T signals (author bios, LinkedIn links)](https://fathom.video/share/gzkSx4WKZyY4bMjvksKzj5JDYmJzt_sW?tab=summary&timestamp=1159.0)
  - [Consider using specific terms like "tutorials," "guides," and "examples" in content](https://fathom.video/share/gzkSx4WKZyY4bMjvksKzj5JDYmJzt_sW?tab=summary&timestamp=1204.0)

### Future Content Strategy

  - [Shift focus to non-branded keywords for organic growth](https://fathom.video/share/gzkSx4WKZyY4bMjvksKzj5JDYmJzt_sW?tab=summary&timestamp=1455.0)
  - [Paul and Theo to source new topic ideas, using a structured Notion workflow](https://fathom.video/share/gzkSx4WKZyY4bMjvksKzj5JDYmJzt_sW?tab=summary&timestamp=677.0)
  - [Team to collaborate on identifying high-value non-branded keywords for 2025 planning](https://fathom.video/share/gzkSx4WKZyY4bMjvksKzj5JDYmJzt_sW?tab=summary&timestamp=1455.0)

### Integration Page Improvements

  - [Add syntax highlighting to code snippets](https://fathom.video/share/gzkSx4WKZyY4bMjvksKzj5JDYmJzt_sW?tab=summary&timestamp=1560.0)
  - [Reintroduce related blog articles component](https://fathom.video/share/gzkSx4WKZyY4bMjvksKzj5JDYmJzt_sW?tab=summary&timestamp=1620.0)
  - [Consider adding plugin CTAs or quotes where relevant](https://fathom.video/share/gzkSx4WKZyY4bMjvksKzj5JDYmJzt_sW?tab=summary&timestamp=1660.0)
  - [Evaluate the potential return of lead generation forms](https://fathom.video/share/gzkSx4WKZyY4bMjvksKzj5JDYmJzt_sW?tab=summary&timestamp=1685.0)
  - [Theo to review and update code snippets for accuracy, starting with Next.js](https://fathom.video/share/gzkSx4WKZyY4bMjvksKzj5JDYmJzt_sW?tab=summary&timestamp=1956.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Paul and Theo to populate new topic ideas in the Notion workflow](https://fathom.video/share/gzkSx4WKZyY4bMjvksKzj5JDYmJzt_sW?tab=summary&timestamp=677.0)
  - [Andrej to address missing descriptions and improve code formatting on integration pages](https://fathom.video/share/gzkSx4WKZyY4bMjvksKzj5JDYmJzt_sW?tab=summary&timestamp=373.0)
  - [Theo to update Next.js integration page code snippets as a priority](https://fathom.video/share/gzkSx4WKZyY4bMjvksKzj5JDYmJzt_sW?tab=summary&timestamp=1956.0)
  - [Team to discuss and plan for deeper, nested integration pages (follow up with Maxime)](https://fathom.video/share/gzkSx4WKZyY4bMjvksKzj5JDYmJzt_sW?tab=summary&timestamp=1892.0)
  - [Golzar and Victor to discuss additional integration page improvements offline](https://fathom.video/share/gzkSx4WKZyY4bMjvksKzj5JDYmJzt_sW?tab=summary&timestamp=1905.0)
